scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:prep && playwright test --config=tests/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/launch
scripts.test:e2e:debug: npm run test:e2e:prep && playwright test --config=tests/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/launch --debug
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run test:e2e:prep && playwright test --config=tests/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/launch --ui
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run test:e2e:prep && playwright test --config=tests/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/smoke
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && TESTING=true DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///./test_specsharp_e2e.db SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key SESSION_SECRET_KEY=test-session-secret-key JWT_SECRET=test-jwt-secret-key ALLOW_AUTO_ORG_PROVISIONING=true ./venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001
scripts.frontend:test: cd frontend && VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001 npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000
